baseline_result.name: CsInH3
baseline_result.summary: Strong low-pressure scientific benchmark, but not an ambient or retained-ambient practical route.

phase09_primary_result.name: RbPH3
phase09_primary_result.summary: Best remaining hydride-side ambient claim, but still lacks the local high-fidelity evidence required for a practical pass.

phase09_benchmark_result.name: KB3C3
phase09_benchmark_result.summary: Strong ambient framework benchmark, but not a validated hydride-route success.

pivot_recommendation.direction: broaden beyond the present conventional hydride route toward experimentally anchored ambient or pressure-quenched systems
next_actions: Stop consumer-language framing for the current hydride milestone
Preserve CsInH3 as the low-pressure hydride benchmark
Start a broader ambient and pressure-quench benchmark search with experimentally anchored routes
